output.model_sql:
{{ config(
    materialized='incremental',
    unique_key='payment_id',
    incremental_strategy='merge',
    tags=['payment']
) }}

WITH source AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ source('payment', 'PAYMENT_TRANSACTION') }}
    {% if is_incremental() %}
    WHERE UPDATED_AT > (SELECT MAX(updated_at) FROM {{ this }})
    {% endif %}
),

renamed AS (
    SELECT
        PAYMENT_ID AS payment_id,
        ORDER_ID AS order_id,
        TRIM(PAYMENT_METHOD) AS payment_method,
        AMOUNT AS amount,
        TRIM(CURRENCY) AS currency,
        TRIM(STATUS) AS status,
        TRIM(PROCESSOR_RESPONSE_CODE) AS processor_response_code,
        TRIM(PROCESSOR_RESPONSE_TEXT) AS processor_response_text,
        CREATED_AT AS created_at,
        UPDATED_AT AS updated_at
    FROM source
)

SELECT * FROM renamed

decision_log.decision: Generated incremental staging model with 10 columns
decision_log.rationale: All columns renamed to snake_case. VARCHAR columns wrapped in TRIM(). Incremental filter on UPDATED_AT. Config block includes materialization, unique_key, and strategy.
